metadata.title: Jailhouse Rock
metadata.album: Bossa Nova Baby: The Ultimate Elvis Presley Party Album
metadata.lyrics:
[00:06.22] The warden threw a party in the county jail
[00:09.06] The prison band was there, and they began to wail
[00:11.87] The band was jumping, and the joint began to swing
[00:14.65] You should've heard them knocked out jailbirds sing
[00:17.36] Let's rock
[00:19.30] Everybody, let's rock
[00:22.87] Everybody in the whole cell block
[00:25.83] Was dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[00:29.20] Spider Murphy played the tenor saxophone
[00:31.97] Little Joe was blowing on the slide trombone
[00:34.96] The drummer boy from Illinois went crash, boom, bang
[00:37.72] The whole rhythm section was the Purple Gang
[00:40.30] Let's rock
[00:42.65] Everybody, let's rock
[00:45.91] Everybody in the whole cell block
[00:48.87] Was dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[00:51.91] Number forty-seven said to number three
[00:54.96] "You're the cutest jailbird I ever did see"
[00:57.78] I sure would be delighted with your company
[01:00.59] Come on and do the Jailhouse Rock with me"
[01:03.27] Let's rock
[01:05.30] Everybody, let's rock
[01:08.83] Everybody in the whole cell block
[01:11.61] Was dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[01:15.85] 
[01:26.31] Sad Sack was sitting on a block of stone
[01:29.18] Way over in the corner weeping all alone
[01:32.00] The warden said, "Hey, buddy, don't you be no square
[01:34.85] You can't find a partner use a wooden chair"
[01:37.45] Let's rock
[01:39.75] Everybody, let's rock
[01:43.15] Everybody in the whole cell block
[01:46.08] Was dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[01:49.32] Shifty Henry said to Bugs, "For Heaven's sake"
[01:52.02] No one's lookin', now's our chance to make a break"
[01:54.93] Bugsy turned to Shifty and he said, "Nix nix
[01:57.78] I wanna stick around awhile and get my kicks"
[02:00.53] Let's rock
[02:02.60] Everybody, let's rock
[02:06.22] Everybody in the whole cell block
[02:09.13] Was dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[02:12.18] Dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[02:15.27] Dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[02:18.05] Dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[02:20.89] Dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[02:23.63] Dancing to the Jailhouse Rock
[02:24.97]
